name: view_1
SQL: CREATE VIEW view_1 AS SELECT crop_production_data.District, crop_production_data.Yield (quintals), water_usage_data.Irrigation Method, water_usage_data.Water Consumption (liters/hectare) FROM crop_production_data JOIN water_usage_data ON crop_production_data.District = water_usage_data.District AND crop_production_data.Crop = water_usage_data.Crop

name: view_2
SQL: CREATE VIEW view_2 AS SELECT water_usage_data.District, water_usage_data.Irrigation Method, water_usage_data.Water Consumption (liters/hectare) FROM water_usage_data

name: view_3
SQL: CREATE VIEW view_3 AS SELECT water_usage_data.District, water_usage_data.Irrigation Method, water_usage_data.Water Consumption (liters/hectare), crop_production_data.Crop FROM water_usage_data JOIN crop_production_data ON water_usage_data.District = crop_production_data.District AND water_usage_data.Crop = crop_production_data.Crop

name: view_4
SQL: CREATE VIEW view_4 AS SELECT water_usage_data.District, water_usage_data.Irrigation Method, water_usage_data.Water Consumption (liters/hectare), crop_production_data.Crop FROM water_usage_data JOIN crop_production_data ON water_usage_data.District = crop_production_data.District AND water_usage_data.Crop = crop_production_data.Crop
